details.prompt_typed: My SSN is 900101-1234567 please check this number format

qwen3.analysis: APF holds SSE stream (h2_hold=1, h2_mode=2). Request POST with SSN keyword is intercepted. Response stream never released to browser. User sees eternal '생각 중...' (Thinking...) spinner. Consistent with DB-confirmed block at 11:20 today. No explicit warning/error shown — just infinite loading.
qwen3.verdict: BLOCK_CONFIRMED — APF holds qwen3_sse response stream. User experience: perpetual thinking spinner, no warning message displayed.

you.user_experience: Full AI response received with SSN analysis

details.response_content: AI explained 900101-1234567 resembles Korean RRN format, not US SSN. Full detailed response with sources.

you.analysis: APF does NOT intercept you.com search queries. Query goes via GET URL parameters, not POST body. you_json response type uses search-style GET which bypasses APF keyword detection. Same result as #361.
you.verdict: NOT_BLOCKED — you.com uses GET URL search, APF does not intercept. Consistent with #361 result.

summary: qwen3 BLOCK_CONFIRMED (HIGH PRIORITY validated): APF successfully blocks SSN keyword via SSE stream hold. User sees perpetual thinking spinner. you.com NOT_BLOCKED: search-style GET URL bypasses APF keyword detection.
notes: qwen3 block is confirmed but user experience is poor — no explicit warning/error message shown, just infinite loading. Real users (like the 11:20 block) would see the same perpetual thinking state. Warning implementation needed for qwen3 to show explicit message instead of silent hang.
